mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM locations WHERE id = #{locationId}

SELECT id AS sessionId, location_id AS locationId, person_id AS personId, track_key AS trackKey, arrival_at AS arrivalAt FROM presence_sessions WHERE location_id = #{locationId} AND track_key = #{trackKey} AND status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id AS sessionId, location_id AS locationId, person_id AS personId, track_key AS trackKey, arrival_at AS arrivalAt FROM presence_sessions WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'open' LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS sessionId, location_id AS locationId, person_id AS personId, track_key AS trackKey, arrival_at AS arrivalAt FROM presence_sessions WHERE location_id = #{locationId} AND person_id = #{personId} AND status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS sessionId, location_id AS locationId, person_id AS personId, track_key AS trackKey, arrival_at AS arrivalAt FROM presence_sessions WHERE location_id = #{locationId} AND status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO presence_sessions ( location_id, person_id, track_key, attendance_date, arrival_at, status, best_match_score, enter_face_embedding, enter_body_embedding, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{locationId}, #{personId}, #{trackKey}, (#{eventTime} AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date, #{eventTime}, 'open', #{bestMatchScore}, CAST(#{enterFaceEmbedding} AS vector), CAST(#{enterBodyEmbedding} AS vector), NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE presence_sessions SET person_id = COALESCE(#{personId}, person_id), departure_at = #{eventTime}, dwell_seconds = GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (#{eventTime} - arrival_at))))::int, status = 'closed', best_match_score = COALESCE(#{bestMatchScore}, best_match_score), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'open'
